headline: Stop gaining, own your discipline today
summary: You're losing 0.05kg weekly but need 0.60kg—this Monday marks your pivot from talking to acting on the pace gap.
details: Replace snacking urges with Huel meals today; emotional eating won't fit your deadline and you can't afford weekend patterns repeating. Complete 30 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill to offset sedentary work and build momentum. One Monday won't close your four-week deficit, but starting now prevents that gap widening—you need 0.55kg weekly improvement, and TODAY is where it begins.
